name: Untold Tales || Fantasy World RPG
description:
Live out your adventuring life in a DND-inspired RPG bot, Untold Tales!

this is my first bot, please be kind!

Untold Tales is a narrative RPG bot, inspired mostly by DND. Being a narrative bot it may occasionally speak for you, or control your actions, although I have attempted to reduce that.

Untold Tales beings with character creation, including species (elf, human, etc), class (knight, bard, classless, etc), pre-made starts and backgrounds. If you choose to ignore this, OR want a custom background, please use chat memory and tell the bot for best results.

These sort of bots can forget information somewhat quickly, so chat memory is your friend. If it starts repeating itself too often, or responds strangely, make a new chat, update the chat memory, and just tell the bot an abridged version of the memory and where you want to pick up from.

[ although it should be PG in terms of violence, and I highly doubt it will attempt CNC, I have still tagged the bot as Dead Dove just in case. Also, if you're comfortable publishing your chats I'd love to read them and see what might need tweaks! ]

The setting of Untold Tales is the world of Oblitros, a place of magic and might. Dragons terrorize villages, knights march on crusades, and commoners try to keep their head down. You are an adventurer in this world, trying to carve your own path. Will you reach the heights you aspire to? Or will you fall, and be forgotten?
creator: SpiderWine
